function e(e){let t=e.match(RegExp(`[A-Z]{2,}(?=[A-Z][a-z]+[0-9]*|\b)|[A-Z]?[a-z]+[0-9]*|[A-Z]|[0-9]+|[гБА-гГњгРА-дґњдЄА-йњњп§А-пЂњпљ¶-пЊЯ]+`,`gu`));return t?t.map(e=>e.toLowerCase()).join(`-`):``}function t(e){if(typeof document>`u`)return``;let t=RegExp(`(?:^|; )${e}=([^;]*)(?:$|; )`),n=document?.cookie.match(t);return n?decodeURIComponent(n[1]):``}function n(e){let t=e;return!e&&typeof window<`u`&&(t=window.navigator.userAgent),/(android|iphone|ipad|mobile|phone|mobi|blackberry)/i.test(t)?`mobile`:`desktop`}function r(e){return new Promise(t=>setTimeout(t,e))}export{e as i,r as n,t as r,n as t};
//# sourceMappingURL=utils-BmZD8Nsx.js.map
